message:
Update all pages with FrankenGlitch headers, author section, and fix build errors

Homepage (app/page.tsx):
  - FrankenGlitch wraps hero heading with random trigger
  - New author credit section: Jeffrey Emanuel / Agent Flywheel
    with 3D-tilted OG image, FrankenContainer with NeuralPulse,
    Magnetic CTAs, and CRT scanline overlay
  - Tweet section header: alien artifact thumbnail (64px) with
    "Hey, it fell off the back of a Spaceship" quote
  - Added Image, Activity, ExternalLink imports
  - data-magnetic attributes on hero CTAs

Architecture page:
  - FrankenGlitch on "Inside the Machine" heading
  - withPulse on pipeline stage containers
  - FrankenGlitch on pipeline stage labels
  - text-left alignment fixes on header content
  - data-magnetic on CTA buttons

War stories page — critical fix:
  - Removed raw import statement and JS comment that were pasted
    inside JSX return body (lines 65-67), which would have caused
    a syntax error: "import WarStoriesMap from ..." and
    "// ... inside the component, replace the story sections with:"
  - Cleaned unused imports: Metadata, warStories, warStoriesExtended,
    WarStoryCard (war story cards replaced by WarStoriesMap)
  - FrankenGlitch on "War Stories" heading
  - Animated subtitle with motion.p fade-in
  - data-magnetic on CTA buttons

Getting started, glossary, showcase pages:
  - Added FrankenGlitch import (used by components on page)
  - FrankenGlitch wraps page headings where applicable

How-it-was-built page:
  - Various visual enhancements and FrankenGlitch integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
